scripts.deploy:itch: npm run build && ~/bin/butler push dist bobtrahan/the-prompt-trail:html5 --ignore '*.DS_Store'
scripts.deploy:wavedash: npm run build && source $HOME/.cargo/env && cd .. && wavedash build push
